slatedb_metrics.name: slatedb.compactor.expired_entries_purged
slatedb_metrics.description: Count of expired entries purged by the RetentionIterator. `entry_type="value"` counts expired value entries rewritten as tombstones; `entry_type="merge"` counts expired merge entries dropped without a tombstone.

slatedb_metrics.name: slatedb.compactor.expired_entries_purged
slatedb_metrics.description: Count of expired entries purged by the RetentionIterator. `entry_type="value"` counts expired value entries rewritten as tombstones; `entry_type="merge"` counts expired merge entries dropped without a tombstone.
